hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cmd = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($cmd -match 'git\s+commit' -and (Get-Content WHITEBOARD.md -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern 'Believed Resolved' -Quiet)) { Write-Error 'BLOCKED: WHITEBOARD.md contains "Believed Resolved" without build evidence. Run /sync-docs first.'; exit 2 } else { exit 0 }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match 'rtx\.fusedWorldViewMode\s*=\s*1') { Write-Error 'BLOCKED: fusedWorldViewMode must be 0 (separate W/V/P matrices, not fused). See CLAUDE.md.'; exit 2 } else { exit 0 }"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$file = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE; if ($file -match '\.(c|cpp|h|hpp)$') { Write-Host "[hook] source file modified: $file - remember to rebuild via run.py" }"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path CHANGELOG.md) { $lastModified = (Get-Item CHANGELOG.md).LastWriteTime; $age = (Get-Date) - $lastModified; if ($age.TotalHours -gt 4) { Write-Host '[hook] CHANGELOG.md not updated in this session - consider /sync-docs before next session' } }"
